differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with Granulomatous-Lymphocytic Interstitial Lung Disease (GLILD)
next_steps: Quantification of serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM) and lymphocyte subset analysis via flow cytometry
16S ribosomal RNA gene sequencing and metagenomic next-generation sequencing (mNGS) on the hepatic abscess tissue
Evaluation of neutrophil function (dihydrorhodamine 123 test) to rule out late-onset CGD
Bone marrow biopsy and aspirate for flow cytometry and T-cell receptor (TCR) gene rearrangement studies to rule out occult lymphoma
Measurement of serum ferritin, triglycerides, and soluble IL-2 receptor (sCD25) to evaluate for HLH
Repeat testing for Coxiella burnetii phase I and II antibodies
